query: SELECT id, dataConsulta, igSemanas, igDumSemanas, igUltrassomSemanas, peso, alturaUterina FROM consultasPrenatal WHERE gestanteId = (SELECT id FROM gestantes WHERE nome LIKE '%Ana Clara Borges%') ORDER BY dataConsulta;
